landing.hero: Your loan offer in under 2 minutes
landing.sub: Video interview, voice form fill, instant decision — no branch visit.
landing.step1.title: Allow permissions
landing.step1.desc: Camera, mic and location — each with a plain-language reason.
landing.step2.title: Answer 4 questions
landing.step2.desc: Speak naturally. AI extracts your details automatically.
landing.step3.title: Get your offer
landing.step3.desc: Instant, personalised rate and EMI — explained in plain English.
landing.trust1.title: Video-KYC
landing.trust1.desc: RBI-compliant identity verification via live video.
landing.trust2.title: Voice form
landing.trust2.desc: Your spoken answers fill the application automatically.
landing.trust3.title: 2-minute decision
landing.trust3.desc: ML-powered scoring delivers your offer instantly.
landing.trust4.title: DPDP compliant
landing.trust4.desc: Every data point disclosed. Right to forget included.
landing.dpdp.title: Data Collection — DPDP Act 2023
landing.dpdp.item1: Video & audio recording for identity verification
landing.dpdp.item2: Microphone transcription to auto-fill your application
landing.dpdp.item3: Location for fraud prevention and compliance
landing.dpdp.item4: Data retained for 5 years per RBI Video-KYC guidelines
landing.dpdp.item5: You have the right to access or request deletion of your data
landing.rbi: RBI Video-KYC Retention Notice: Your video recording will be stored securely for a minimum of 5 years as required by RBI Master Direction on KYC.
landing.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
perm.camera.title: Allow Camera & Microphone
perm.camera.reason: RBI video-KYC requires live video to verify your identity, and your spoken responses fill the form automatically.
perm.geo.title: Allow Location Access
perm.geo.reason: Location is used for fraud prevention and regulatory compliance checks.
perm.error.camera: Camera and microphone access are required to continue. Please allow and try again.
offer.ineligible: We cannot offer a loan at this time
accepted.title: You are all set!
accepted.body: Our team will verify your details and reach out within 24 hours.
accepted.cooloff: You have a 3-day cool-off period per RBI digital lending guidelines. You may cancel this application within this period without penalty.
